_comment: A real CES Swap event captured live from the CSPR.cloud contract-events stream (testnet) for the DemoDex contract, block 8359594, deploy 012f04061483a1fdac1f9f82eee7d74381f1da8d6baae3b4c2a0a03ef53fb699. This is the exact envelope shape the Sluice matcher normalizes and evaluates predicates against.
